zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Wychingham於1402年出生在英國諾福爾可武德利辛時，他的父親Nicholas Wychingham44歲，母親Joan Antingham22歲。他於1422年與Alice Fastolfe在英國諾福爾可武德利辛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Wychingham于1402年出生在英国諾福爾可武德利辛时，他的父亲Nicholas Wychingham44岁，母亲Joan Antingham22岁。他于1422年与Alice Fastolfe在英国諾福爾可武德利辛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Wychingham was born in 1402, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England, his father, Nicholas Wychingham, was 44 and his mother, Joan Antingham, was 22. He married Alice Fastolfe in 1422, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Wychingham est né en 1402, à Woodrising, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Wychingham, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joan Antingham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Fastolfe en 1422, à Woodrising, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Wychingham 1402 in Woodrising, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Wychingham 44 und seine Mutter Joan Antingham 22. Er hat 1422 in Woodrising, Norfolk, England Alice Fastolfe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1472 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Wychingham è nato il nel 1402 nel Woodrising, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Wychingham, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Joan Antingham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Fastolfe nel 1422, nel Woodrising, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1472, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Wychinghamが1402年にイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングで生まれた時，父Nicholas Wychinghamは44歳，母Joan Antinghamは22歳であった。1422年にイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングでAlice Fastolfeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Wychingham(이)가 1402년 영국 노르폴크 우드리징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Wychingham(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Antingham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 노르폴크 우드리징에서 Alice Fastolfe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Wychingham nasceu em 1402, em Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Wychingham, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joan Antingham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Fastolfe em 1422, em Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1472, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Wychingham родился в 1402 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Wychingham было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Antingham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Fastolfe в 1422 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1472 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Wychingham nació en 1402, en Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Wychingham, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Joan Antingham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice Fastolfe en 1422, en Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1472, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
